description: Style NoteFall in love with these oh-so-adorable pair of mittens from Madagascar for your little one. They aren't just for the winter, put them on your baby's hands when you're taking him to the creche on early mornings or that late evening dinner. We recommend you buy these in more than just one colour to match his onesies!Product DetailsBlue mittens with mildly elasticated cuffs and print on the upper palm regionMaterial and CareSoft, blended fabricWash with like colours Dry immediately after wash
